title: Israel says it has killed Iran’s intelligence minister in third assassination in two days
summary_full: Israel's Defense Forces said Wednesday that Iran's intelligence minister, Esmail Khatib, had been killed in a "targeted strike" in Tehran.
summary_public: Israel's Defense Forces said Wednesday that Iran's intelligence minister, Esmail Khatib, had been killed in a "targeted strike" in Tehran.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel says it has killed Iran’s intelligence minister
